web.title: Request a Pool Resurfacing Quote | Fibrestyle Sydney
web.description: Get a free, no-obligation quote for your pool resurfacing project in Sydney. Contact Fibrestyle today for expert advice and quality service.
web.markdown:
## Request A Free Quote

Need a quote for your pool project? Complete this form and one of our sales team will get back to you as soon as possible. If you have a general inquiry, please **use this form.**

Fields marked with an asterisk (\*) are required.

First Name \*

Last Name \*

Email \*

Phone Number\*

Suburb NSW

Pool Size (Length x Width)

Existing Pool Finish

How did you hear about us?

Additional Notes

## Does Your Pool Need Resurfacing?

[Get a Free Estimate](https://www.fibrestyle.com.au/quote/) [Contact Us](https://www.fibrestyle.com.au/contact-us/)
